Source: CDC PLACES County-Level Data. Values are age-adjusted or crude prevalence estimates.

Related Entities

  • hospital HENDRICK MEDICAL CENTER BROWNWOOD 1-star overall rating
  • snf CROSS COUNTRY HEALTHCARE CENTER 4-star, 94 beds
  • snf BANGS NURSING AND REHABILITATION 5-star, 48 beds
  • snf BROWNWOOD NURSING AND REHABILITATION 5-star, 128 beds
  • snf OAK RIDGE MANOR 4-star, 114 beds
  • snf Songbird Lodge 2-star, 121 beds
  • snf CARE NURSING & REHABILITATION 4-star, 97 beds
  • snf PECAN BAYOU NURSING AND REHABILITATION 4-star, 90 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
